description: Two steps: acid to acid chloride then amide
Two steps: borylation then Suzuki coupling
Three steps: borylation then Suzuki then acylation
Grignard → Alcohol: Ethyl bromide >> Grignard reagent >> Alkoxide intermediate >> Alcohol
Aldol Condensation → Allylic Alcohol: Acetaldehyde (×2) >> β-hydroxy aldehyde >> α
Benzene → Azo Dye: Benzene >> Nitrobenzene >> Aniline >> Diazonium >> Azo dye
Aspirin Synthesis + Hydrolysis check: alicylic acid + Acetic anhydride >> Aspirin >> (hydrolysis back) Salicylic acid + Acetic acid
